tasks.label: Environment: Devcontainer hint
tasks.command: if [ -f /.dockerenv ] || [ -n "${REMOTE_CONTAINERS:-}" ] || [ -n "${DEVCONTAINER:-}" ]; then exit 0; fi; echo "WARNING: Open this workspace in the Dev Container for full tools (Command Palette -> Dev Containers: Reopen in Container)."; exit 1

windows.command: if ($env:REMOTE_CONTAINERS -or $env:DEVCONTAINER -or $env:CODESPACES) { exit 0 }; Write-Host 'WARNING: Open this workspace in the Dev Container for full tools (Command Palette -> Dev Containers: Reopen in Container).'; exit 1

tasks.label: Docker: Ensure Running
tasks.command: docker info > /dev/null 2>&1 && exit 0; echo 'Docker daemon not running. Please start Docker and retry.'; exit 1

windows.command: if (docker info 2>$null) { exit 0 }; $dd = 'C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\Docker Desktop.exe'; if (-not (Test-Path $dd)) { Write-Error 'Docker Desktop not found. Please start Docker manually.'; exit 1 }; Write-Host 'Starting Docker Desktop...'; Start-Process $dd; $timeout = 120; $interval = 3; while ($timeout -gt 0) { Start-Sleep $interval; $timeout -= $interval; if (docker info 2>$null) { Write-Host 'Docker is ready.'; exit 0 } }; Write-Error 'Docker Desktop did not become ready in time.'; exit 1

tasks.label: Tests: Run (auto env)
tasks.command: if [ -f /.dockerenv ] || [ -n "${REMOTE_CONTAINERS:-}" ] || [ -n "${DEVCONTAINER:-}" ]; then bash scripts/run-tests.sh; else bash scripts/run-tests.sh --local; fi
